templates.name: Can the wraps be applied to my real nails?
templates.content: Yes! Our wraps work best when applied to your nail bed, as it follows the length and shape of your nails. Hope this clarifies!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.lilyandfox.com/pages/faq-shipping-info

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@lilyandfox.com. Our team is happy to look into this for you!

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@lilyandfox.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Do you offer international shipping?
templates.content: Yes, we ship globally!

templates.name: How do I start a return or exchange?
templates.content: Please send us an email at help@lilyandfox.com so we can get started on the return or exchange process.

templates.name: When do pre sale items ship?
templates.content: If you add a Pre-sale item to your order, your order will ship within 7 days in 1 package. If you have any questions about this, please get in touch with us at help@lilyandfox.com!

templates.name: Will my orders be combined if they are placed close together?
templates.content: Yes! Sometimes we will combine your orders to help get your orders to you faster!

templates.name: Are your wraps vegan, non-toxic and cruelty-free?
templates.content: Yes, we are 100% vegan, 10-free and cruelty free!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/lilyandfox/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/lilyandfox/

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at help@lilyandfox.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at help@lilyandfox.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content:
You can give us a call at +1800 298 8058, Monday-Friday,
9am-5pm or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all orders within the US!

templates.name: Can I have a tracking number?/Where is my order
templates.content:
Unfortunately, our free shipping option does not include a tracking number but we do offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee which means we will refund your money if you are not satisfied with your order for any reason!

If you would like your order to have a tracking number, please choose one of our paid shipping options on checkout. This has the added benefit of you getting your order super fast!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time usually takes 2-3 business days and once shipped it will take 8-14 days for domestic orders.

templates.name: No promotion available - brand specific
templates.content: I'm sorry, but we do not currently provide samples of our products/codes. However, we do work hard to provide our wraps at the most affordable price! We also include a free test wrap with your first purchase, these wraps are provided so that you can practice the application process.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We have two warehouses where we ship your orders from - Illinois and Australia.
